# Perkins Catering Co.

> Farm-to-table catering in Napa, Sonoma, and Marin counties. Led by Executive Chef Austin Perkins, we craft custom menus for weddings, corporate events, and private gatherings using locally sourced ingredients.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Overview of Perkins Catering Co. — services, chef bio, testimonials, service area
- [Chef](/bio): Executive Chef Austin Perkins — career history, Michelin-recommended credentials, culinary philosophy
- [Menu](/menu): Seasonal catering menu — salads, soups, appetizers, entrées with locally sourced ingredients
- [Photos](/photos): Photo gallery of catered events and cuisine
- [Events](/events): Event types — weddings, corporate events, private dinners with planning process
- [Summer](/summer): Summer meal program — pickup at Imagery Winery, Glen Ellen CA, delivery available
- [Inquire](/inquire): Multi-step catering inquiry and quote request form
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): Client reviews and testimonials
- [Cost](/cost): Catering pricing guide and investment tiers
- [Resources](/resources): Event planning tips and FAQ
- [Contact](/contact): Contact information — phone, email, service area

## Business Info
- Phone: 707-981-7822
- Email: reservations@perkinscateringco.com
- Service Area: Napa County, Sonoma County, Marin County
- Chef: Austin Perkins, Executive Chef & Owner
